title: Mavvan Conflict
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}} {{Campaign |prev= |conc= |next= |image= |name=Mavvan Conflict |conflict= |begin=Between [[19 BBY/Legends|19]] and [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]]According to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] was [[Declaration of a New Order|founded]] founded in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. In addition, {{SW|url=news/the-droids-re-animated-part-1|series=The Droids Re-Animated|text=Part 1|nolive=1}} dates the events of ''[[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO]]'' to fifteen [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']]. As ''The New Essential Chronology'' dates the events of ''A New Hope'', including the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], to the year [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], the events of "[[The Frozen Citadel]]" can therefore be dated to [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]]. Using this information, while taking into account that the Empire participated in the event, it can be determined that the Mavvan Conflict occurred between 19 and 15 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]. |end=Between 19 and 15 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]] |date= |place=[[Mavva system/Legends|Mavva system]]{{Planetnamia|other=the Mavvan Conflict|system=[[Mavva system/Legends|Mavva system]]|legends=1}} |result=*[[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Empire]] discontinues its use of the [[Rooze Disease|rooze germ]]{{DroidsCite|The Frozen Citadel}} *[[Kobothi S-Corps]] created''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' |battles= |side1=Galactic Empire |side2=Rebels *[[Kobok/Legends|Koboks]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |forces1= |forces2= |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=Many Imperials |casual2=Many rebels |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Have you even heard of rooze, Admiral Screed?"
"Yes. A strain of germ warfare used during the Mavvan Conflict. It destroyed as many Imperials as it did rebels. We'd never used it again.|[[Bisad Koong]] and [[Terrinald Screed/Legends|Terrinald Screed]]|}} The '''Mavvan Conflict''' was a series of skirmishes fought between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and rebels between the [[19 BBY/Legends|19]] and [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]]. During the conflict, the Empire unleashed a [[Bioweapon/Legends|biological agent]], the [[Rooze Disease|rooze germ]], which [[Death/Legends|killed]] just as many Imperials as it did rebels. Because of this the Empire used Rooze never again. Immune to the disease, [[Kobok/Legends|Koboks]] who earned distinction during the Mavvan Conflict were awarded the [[Koboth Insurgent Mantle]]. The conflict lead to the creation of the [[Kobothi S-Corps]], while also defining the [[Species/Legends|species']] reputation as capable warriors and causing the Empire to discontinue its use of the rooze virus in [[germ warfare]]. The Kobok [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] [[Gaff]] wore an [[Koboth]] Insurgent Mantle, though it was unknown whether [[Gender/Legends|he]] actually earned it or acquired the mantle from a veteran of the Mavvan Conflict. It shared its name with the [[Mavva system/Legends|Mavva system]].''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Behind the scenes== The Mavvan Conflict was first mentioned in "[[The Frozen Citadel]]," the thirteenth and final episode of the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] animated series ''[[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO]]'', which originally aired on [[November 30]], [[1985]].{{InsiderCite|27|A Star Wars CELibration|A ''Star Wars'' CELibration}} While ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' the spelled the conflict's title as "Mavvan," the DVD subtitles for ''[[Treasure of the Hidden Planet]]'' spelled it "Maven."''[[Treasure of the Hidden Planet]]'' ==Appearances== *{{DroidsCite|The Frozen Citadel}} {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' *{{CSWECite|I||Gaff}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |nl=Mavvan Conflict }} [[Category:Battles in the Aparo sector]] [[Category:Conflicts of the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Early Imperial campaigns]]
